attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 WINVMB.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           ,
 RP.ITEM_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY,                  
 WINVMB.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
 WINVMB.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     ,
 WINVMB.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT * NHBFS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100  DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT* NHBFS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100  DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM * NHBFS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100  DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT *NHBFS.COGS_SPLIT_PCT/100   DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT     ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT * NHBFS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100   DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT   ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT  * NHBFS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100  DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT    ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT  * NHBFS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100   DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT *NHBFS.COGS_SPLIT_PCT/100    DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT * NHBFS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100  DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
 WINVMB.EDW_CREATE_USER        ,
 WINVMB.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME            ,
 WINVMB.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 WINVMB.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME            ,
  'Y' ATTRIBUTED_FLG ,            
 WINVMB.PRODUCT_KEY AS BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY,
 WINVMB.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME ,
 WINVMB.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD /* OA Q1FY15 Changes */
,WINVMB.POB_TYPE_CD /* NRS MPOB Change */ 
,WINVMB.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG /*Added as part of NRS PI3 changes*/ 
,WINVMB.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE * NHBFS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100  
,WINVMB.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE * NHBFS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100
 FROM 
 $$STGDB.WI_INV_MSR_BNDL_QRTR_CURR_MNTH WINVMB
 INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_HNDSHK_BNDL_TYP_FMLY_SPLT NHBFS
 ON(WINVMB.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME= NHBFS.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME AND NHBFS.BK_ALLOCATION_TYPE_CD='ACTUAL')
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN RP
 ON RP.BK_PRODUCT_ID = TRIM(NHBFS.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID)||'_ADJ_PROD'
 
 UNION ALL
 
 SELECT
 WINVMB.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           ,
 RP.ITEM_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY,                  
 WINVMB.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
 WINVMB.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     ,
 WINVMB.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT * NHBFS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100  DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT* NHBFS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100  DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM * NHBFS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100  DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT *NHBFS.COGS_SPLIT_PCT/100   DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT     ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT * NHBFS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100   DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT   ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT  * NHBFS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100  DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT    ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT  * NHBFS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100   DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT *NHBFS.COGS_SPLIT_PCT/100    DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT * NHBFS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100  DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
 WINVMB.EDW_CREATE_USER        ,
 WINVMB.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME            ,
 WINVMB.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 WINVMB.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME            ,
  'Y' ATTRIBUTED_FLG ,            
 WINVMB.PRODUCT_KEY AS BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY ,
 WINVMB.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME ,
 WINVMB.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD /* OA Q1FY15 Changes */
,WINVMB.POB_TYPE_CD /* NRS MPOB Change */ 
,WINVMB.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG /*Added as part of NRS PI3 changes*/
,WINVMB.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE * NHBFS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100
,WINVMB.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE * NHBFS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100
 FROM 
 $$STGDB.WI_INV_MSR_BNDL_QRTR_PRV_MNTH WINVMB
 INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_HNDSHK_BNDL_TYP_FMLY_SPLT NHBFS
 ON(WINVMB.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME= NHBFS.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME  AND NHBFS.BK_ALLOCATION_TYPE_CD='ACTUAL')
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN RP
 ON RP.BK_PRODUCT_ID = TRIM(NHBFS.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID)||'_ADJ_PROD'

SELECT
 WINVMB.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           ,
 RP.ITEM_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY,                  
 WINVMB.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
 WINVMB.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     ,
 WINVMB.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT * NHBPS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100  DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT* NHBPS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100  DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM * NHBPS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100  DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT *NHBPS.COGS_SPLIT_PCT/100   DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT     ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT * NHBPS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100   DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT   ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT  * NHBPS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100  DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT    ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT  * NHBPS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100   DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT *NHBPS.COGS_SPLIT_PCT/100    DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT * NHBPS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100  DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
 WINVMB.EDW_CREATE_USER        ,
 WINVMB.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME            ,
 WINVMB.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 WINVMB.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME            ,
  'Y' ATTRIBUTED_FLG ,            
 WINVMB.PRODUCT_KEY AS BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY,
 WINVMB.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME ,
 WINVMB.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD /* OA Q1FY15 Changes */
 ,WINVMB.POB_TYPE_CD /* NRS MPOB Change */
,WINVMB.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG /*Added as part of NRS PI3 changes*/  
,WINVMB.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE * NHBPS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100
,WINVMB.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE * NHBPS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100
  FROM 
 $$STGDB.WI_INV_MSR_BNDL_QRTR_CURR_MNTH WINVMB
 INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_HNDSHK_BNDL_TYP_PRD_SPLT NHBPS
 ON(WINVMB.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME= NHBPS.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME  AND NHBPS.BK_ALLOCATION_TYPE_CD='ACTUAL')
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN RP
 ON (RP. ITEM_KEY= NHBPS.PRODUCT_KEY)
 
 
 UNION ALL
 
 SELECT
 WINVMB.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           ,
 RP.ITEM_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY,                  
 WINVMB.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
 WINVMB.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     ,
 WINVMB.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT * NHBPS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100  DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      ,

 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM * NHBPS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100  DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT *NHBPS.COGS_SPLIT_PCT/100   DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT     ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT * NHBPS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100   DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT   ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT  * NHBPS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100  DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT    ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT  * NHBPS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100   DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT *NHBPS.COGS_SPLIT_PCT/100    DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT * NHBPS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100  DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
 WINVMB.EDW_CREATE_USER        ,
 WINVMB.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME            ,
 WINVMB.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 WINVMB.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME            ,
  'Y' ATTRIBUTED_FLG ,            
 WINVMB.PRODUCT_KEY AS BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY,
 WINVMB.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME ,
 WINVMB.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD /* OA Q1FY15 Changes */
 ,WINVMB.POB_TYPE_CD /* NRS MPOB Change */ 
 ,WINVMB.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG /*Added as part of NRS PI3 changes*/ 
,WINVMB.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE * NHBPS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100
,WINVMB.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE * NHBPS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100
 FROM 
 $$STGDB.WI_INV_MSR_BNDL_QRTR_PRV_MNTH WINVMB
 INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_HNDSHK_BNDL_TYP_PRD_SPLT NHBPS
 ON(WINVMB.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME= NHBPS.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME AND NHBPS.BK_ALLOCATION_TYPE_CD='ACTUAL')
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN RP
 ON (RP. ITEM_KEY= NHBPS.PRODUCT_KEY)

SELECT
 WINVMB.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           ,
 WINVMB.PRODUCT_KEY,                  
 WINVMB.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
 WINVMB.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     ,
 WINVMB.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT       ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT      ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT        ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT     ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT     ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ,
 WINVMB.EDW_CREATE_USER        ,
 WINVMB.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME            ,
 WINVMB.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 WINVMB.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME            ,
  'Y' ATTRIBUTED_FLG ,            
 WINVMB.PRODUCT_KEY AS BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY    ,
 WINVMB.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME   ,
 WINVMB.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD /* OA Q1FY15 Changes */
 ,WINVMB.POB_TYPE_CD /* NRS MPOB Change */ 
 ,WINVMB.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG /*Added as part of NRS PI3 changes*/ 
,WINVMB.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE
,WINVMB.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
 FROM 
 $$STGDB.WI_INV_MSR_BNDL_QRTR_CURR_MNTH WINVMB
 WHERE WINVMB.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME NOT IN 
 (SELECT NHBFS.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME FROM  $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_HNDSHK_BNDL_TYP_FMLY_SPLT NHBFS 
 WHERE NHBFS.BK_ALLOCATION_TYPE_CD='ACTUAL'
 UNION ALL
 SELECT NHBPS.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME FROM  $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_HNDSHK_BNDL_TYP_PRD_SPLT NHBPS
 WHERE NHBPS.BK_ALLOCATION_TYPE_CD='ACTUAL')
 
 
 UNION ALL
 
 SELECT
 WINVMB.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           ,
 WINVMB.PRODUCT_KEY,                  
 WINVMB.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
 WINVMB.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     ,
 WINVMB.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT       ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT      ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT        ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT     ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT     ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ,
 WINVMB.EDW_CREATE_USER        ,
 WINVMB.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME            ,
 WINVMB.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 WINVMB.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME            ,
  'Y' ATTRIBUTED_FLG ,            
 WINVMB.PRODUCT_KEY AS BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY  ,
 WINVMB.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME   ,
 WINVMB.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD /* OA Q1FY15 Changes */  
 ,WINVMB.POB_TYPE_CD /* NRS MPOB Change */ 
 ,WINVMB.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG /*Added as part of NRS PI3 changes*/ 
,WINVMB.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE
,WINVMB.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
 FROM 
 $$STGDB.WI_INV_MSR_BNDL_QRTR_PRV_MNTH WINVMB
 WHERE WINVMB.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME NOT IN 
 (SELECT NHBFS.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME FROM  $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_HNDSHK_BNDL_TYP_FMLY_SPLT NHBFS 
 WHERE NHBFS.BK_ALLOCATION_TYPE_CD='ACTUAL'
 UNION ALL
 SELECT NHBPS.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME FROM  $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_HNDSHK_BNDL_TYP_PRD_SPLT NHBPS
 WHERE NHBPS.BK_ALLOCATION_TYPE_CD='ACTUAL')

SELECT 
 WINVMB.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           ,
 WINVMB.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
 WINVMB.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
 WINVMB.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     ,
 WINVMB.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT       ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT      ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT        ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT     ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT     ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ,
 WINVMB.EDW_CREATE_USER        ,
 WINVMB.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME            ,
 WINVMB.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 WINVMB.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME            ,
  'N' ATTRIBUTED_FLG                 ,
 /* WINVMB.PRODUCT_KEY  BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY, */
 CASE WHEN WINVMB.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','BUNDLE','OFFSET','BIB','BIB OFFSET') THEN WINVMB.DV_PRODUCT_KEY ELSE WINVMB.PRODUCT_KEY END BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY, /* OA Q1FY15 Changes */
 'UNKNOWN' AS BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME  ,
 WINVMB.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD /* OA Q1FY15 Changes */
 ,WINVMB.POB_TYPE_CD /* NRS MPOB Change */
,WINVMB.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG /*Added as part of NRS PI3 changes*/  
,WINVMB.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE
,WINVMB.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
 FROM 
 $$STGDB.WI_INV_MSR_NONBNDL_QRT_CUR_MNT WINVMB
 
 UNION ALL
 
 SELECT 
 WINVMB.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           ,
 WINVMB.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
 WINVMB.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
 WINVMB.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     ,
 WINVMB.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT       ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT      ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT        ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT     ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT     ,
 WINVMB.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ,
 WINVMB.EDW_CREATE_USER        ,
 WINVMB.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME            ,
 WINVMB.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 WINVMB.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME            ,
  'N' ATTRIBUTED_FLG                 ,
 /* WINVMB.PRODUCT_KEY  BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY, */
 CASE WHEN WINVMB.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','BUNDLE','OFFSET','BIB','BIB OFFSET') THEN WINVMB.DV_PRODUCT_KEY ELSE WINVMB.PRODUCT_KEY END BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY, /* OA Q1FY15 Changes */
 'UNKNOWN' AS BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME  ,
 WINVMB.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD /* OA Q1FY15 Changes */
 ,WINVMB.POB_TYPE_CD /* NRS MPOB Change */
,WINVMB.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG /*Added as part of NRS PI3 changes*/  
,WINVMB.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE
,WINVMB.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
 FROM 
 $$STGDB.WI_INV_MSR_NONBNDL_QRT_PRV_MNT WINVMB
